description: Four-seam otter trawl: mouth = 14' (4.3-m) X 5' (1.5-m); length = 17'4"(5.3-m); cod-end = Delta 1/8" mesh (1-1/4" stretched); trawl-body mesh: 5/8" (1-3/8" stretched); treated with Plasti-Net...1

The AFS experimental gillnet with an added “large fish panel” is 80’ long by 6’ deep, with eight 10’ long mesh sizes. The meshes in the main gillnet are 1.5”, 2.25”, 1”, 1.75”, 0.75”, 2.5”, 1.25”, and 2” square mesh, in that order. The large fish panel will be attached to the 2” end of the main gillnet with a 10’ length of line between the two, acting as a “blank” panel to minimize leading of large fishes. The large fish panel is 30’ long by 6’ deep and has three 10’ long meshes with sizes 3”, 3.5”, and 4” square mesh. Both panels have a 3/8” foam-core top rope, a 30# lead-core bottom rope, and meshes constructed with nylon monofilament.
